output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>
#include <cstring>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint8_t version;
    uint8_t flags;
    uint16_t packet_id;
};

PacketHeader read_packet_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a binary_stream from the buffer (remove const qualifier)
    auto non_const_buffer = const_cast<std::span<uint8_t>>(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(non_const_buffer);
    
    // Use span() to read the header with zero-copy
    auto header_span = stream.span<uint8_t>(4); // 4 bytes: 2 uint8_t + 1 uint16_t
    
    PacketHeader header;
    std::memcpy(&header, header_span.data(), sizeof(header));
    
    return header;
}

std::string_view read_message_until_delimiter(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a binary_stream from the buffer (remove const qualifier)
    auto non_const_buffer = const_cast<std::span<uint8_t>>(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(non_const_buffer);
    
    // Use view() to read null-terminated string with zero-copy
    return stream.view();
}
```</answer>

 Code:

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Remove constness from the buffer for the buffer_adaptor
    auto non_const_buffer = const_cast<std::span<uint8_t>>(buffer);

    // Create a buffer_adaptor from the non-const buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<uint8_t>> adaptor(non_const_buffer);

    // Check if there is enough data for the header
    if (adaptor.size() < sizeof(PacketHeader)) {
        return PacketHeader{};
    }

    // Create a binary_stream from the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    // Use the binary_stream's span method to get a zero-copy view of the header
    auto header_span = stream.span<PacketHeader>(1);

    // Check if the stream is in a good state
    if (!stream.good()) {
        return PacketHeader{};
    }

    // Return the header
    return *header_span[0];
}
```

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream<hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>>> stream(adaptor);

    stream << header;
    stream << data;

    return buffer;
}
```
